description_long: This is a white, mid-1990s four-door sedan with a streamlined body and a slightly sloped rear. The car is missing all four wheels, exposing the wheel wells and brake assemblies, and the undercarriage is partially visible. The windows are tinted and the side mirrors are intact, with the front windshield showing some interior detail. The body features a black trim line running along the sides, and the door handles are flush with the body. The rear of the car has a rectangular license plate area and red tail lights, while the front has a simple grille and headlight assembly. The overall condition suggests the vehicle is abandoned or inoperable, likely found in an urban salvage or street context.
description: A white, four-door sedan missing its wheels, with black side trim and visible interior through tinted windows. The car appears abandoned or inoperable, with exposed wheel wells and intact body panels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, missing wheels, black trim, and clear view of the doors and windows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the grille, headlights, and windshield, with the missing front wheels visible.
description_view_2: Right side view similar to the left, showing missing wheels, black trim, and the car's overall length.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the trunk, tail lights, license plate area, and rear windshield.
